title: Domain Model + Repository Mapper — Add currencyCode and targetAmountCents
description: Update the domain Transaction model and the FinanceRepositoryImpl entity↔domain mappers to carry currencyCode and targetAmountCents through the full data pipeline.
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-115' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-115' to ingest requirements
Write failing tests for mapper round-trips: entity→domain and domain→entity preserve currencyCode and targetAmountCents (Red Phase)
Add `val currencyCode: String = ""` and `val targetAmountCents: Long? = null` to domain Transaction.kt
Update FinanceRepositoryImpl toEntity()/toDomain() mapper functions to include the two new fields
definition_of_done: Domain Transaction model has currencyCode and targetAmountCents fields
FinanceRepositoryImpl mappers round-trip both fields without loss
All modified files have @trace TASK-115 annotation
